003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.SchemaUtils.*;
021
022import java.lang.annotation.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
030
031/**
032 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link Schema @Schema} annotation.
033 *
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_allOf)
037})
038public class SchemaAnnotation {
039
040   // Property name constants
041   private static final String PROP_allOf = "allOf";
042   private static final String PROP_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
043   private static final String PROP_const = "const";
044   private static final String PROP_contentEncoding = "contentEncoding";
045   private static final String PROP_contentMediaType = "contentMediaType";
046   private static final String PROP_default = "default";
047   private static final String PROP_deprecated = "deprecated";
048   private static final String PROP_dependentRequired = "dependentRequired";
049   private static final String PROP_dependentSchemas = "dependentSchemas";
050   private static final String PROP_description = "description";
051   private static final String PROP_discriminator = "discriminator";
052   private static final String PROP_else = "else";
053   private static final String PROP_enum = "enum";
054   private static final String PROP_examples = "examples";
055   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
056   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
057   private static final String PROP_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
058   private static final String PROP_format = "format";
059   private static final String PROP_id = "$id";
060   private static final String PROP_if = "if";
061   private static final String PROP_ignore = "ignore";
062   private static final String PROP_items = "items";
063   private static final String PROP_maximum = "maximum";
064   private static final String PROP_maxItems = "maxItems";
065   private static final String PROP_maxLength = "maxLength";
066   private static final String PROP_maxProperties = "maxProperties";
067   private static final String PROP_minimum = "minimum";
068   private static final String PROP_minItems = "minItems";
069   private static final String PROP_minLength = "minLength";
070   private static final String PROP_minProperties = "minProperties";
071   private static final String PROP_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
072   private static final String PROP_pattern = "pattern";
073   private static final String PROP_prefixItems = "prefixItems";
074   private static final String PROP_readOnly = "readOnly";
075   private static final String PROP_ref = "$ref";
076   private static final String PROP_required = "required";
077   private static final String PROP_summary = "summary";
078   private static final String PROP_then = "then";
079   private static final String PROP_title = "title";
080   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
081   private static final String PROP_unevaluatedItems = "unevaluatedItems";
082   private static final String PROP_unevaluatedProperties = "unevaluatedProperties";
083   private static final String PROP_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
084   private static final String PROP_xml = "xml";
085   private static final String PROP_comment = "$comment";
086   private static final String PROP_defs = "$defs";
087
088   /**
089    * Prevents instantiation.
090    */
091   private SchemaAnnotation() {}
092
093   /**
094    * Builder class.
095    *
096    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
097    *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#annotations(Annotation...)}
098    * </ul>
099    */
100   @SuppressWarnings({
101      "java:S116" // Field names intentionally match JSON property names
102   })
103   public static class Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder {
104
105      private boolean aev;
106      private boolean allowEmptyValue;
107      private boolean emax;
108      private boolean emin;
109      private boolean exclusiveMaximum;
110      private boolean exclusiveMinimum;
111      private boolean ignore;
112      private boolean r;
113      private boolean readOnly;
114      private boolean required;
115      private boolean ro;
116      private boolean sie;
117      private boolean skipIfEmpty;
118      private boolean ui;
119      private boolean uniqueItems;
120      private ExternalDocs externalDocs = ExternalDocsAnnotation.DEFAULT;
121      private Items items = ItemsAnnotation.DEFAULT;
122      private long maxi = -1;
123      private long maxItems = -1;
124      private long maxl = -1;
125      private long maxLength = -1;
126      private long maxp = -1;
127      private long maxProperties = -1;
128      private long mini = -1;
129      private long minItems = -1;
130      private long minl = -1;
131      private long minLength = -1;
132      private long minp = -1;
133      private long minProperties = -1;
134      private String $ref = "";
135      private String cf = "";
136      private String collectionFormat = "";
137      private String discriminator = "";
138      private String f = "";
139      private String format = "";
140      private String max = "";
141      private String maximum = "";
142      private String min = "";
143      private String minimum = "";
144      private String mo = "";
145      private String multipleOf = "";
146      private String p = "";
147      private String pattern = "";
148      private String su = "";
149      private String summary = "";
150      private String t = "";
151      private String title = "";
152      private String type = "";
153      private String[] default_ = {};
154      private String[] enum_ = {};
155      private String[] allOf = {};
156      private String[] d = {};
157      private String[] description = {};
158      private String[] df = {};
159      private String[] e = {};
160      private String[] xml = {};
161      private boolean deprecatedProperty;
162      private String $id = "";
163      private String contentMediaType = "";
164      private String contentEncoding = "";
165      private String exclusiveMaximumValue = "";
166      private String exclusiveMinimumValue = "";
167      private String[] const_ = {};
168      private String[] examples = {};
169      private String[] $comment = {};
170      private String[] prefixItems = {};
171      private String[] unevaluatedItems = {};
172      private String[] unevaluatedProperties = {};
173      private String[] dependentSchemas = {};
174      private String[] dependentRequired = {};
175      private String[] if_ = {};
176      private String[] then_ = {};
177      private String[] else_ = {};
178      private String[] $defs = {};
179
180      /**
181       * Constructor.
182       */
183      protected Builder() {
184         super(Schema.class);
185      }
186
187      /**
188       * Sets the {@link Schema#const_} property on this annotation.
189       *
190       * @param value The new value for this property.
191       * @return This object.
192       */
193      @SuppressWarnings({
194         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to match JSON Schema keyword
195      })
196      public Builder const_(String...value) {
197         const_ = value;
198         return this;
199      }
200
201      /**
202       * Sets the {@link Schema#default_} property on this annotation.
203       *
204       * @param value The new value for this property.
205       * @return This object.
206       */
207      @SuppressWarnings({
208         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflict
209      })
210      public Builder default_(String...value) {
211         default_ = value;
212         return this;
213      }
214
215      /**
216       * Sets the {@link Schema#else_} property on this annotation.
217       *
218       * @param value The new value for this property.
219       * @return This object.
220       */
221      @SuppressWarnings({
222         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflict
223      })
224      public Builder else_(String...value) {
225         else_ = value;
226         return this;
227      }
228
229      /**
230       * Sets the {@link Schema#enum_} property on this annotation.
231       *
232       * @param value The new value for this property.
233       * @return This object.
234       */
235      @SuppressWarnings({
236         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflict
237      })
238      public Builder enum_(String...value) {
239         enum_ = value;
240         return this;
241      }
242
243      /**
244       * Sets the {@link Schema#if_} property on this annotation.
245       *
246       * @param value The new value for this property.
247       * @return This object.
248       */
249      @SuppressWarnings({
250         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflict
251      })
252      public Builder if_(String...value) {
253         if_ = value;
254         return this;
255      }
256
257      /**
258       * Sets the {@link Schema#then_} property on this annotation.
259       *
260       * @param value The new value for this property.
261       * @return This object.
262       */
263      @SuppressWarnings({
264         "java:S100" // Method name uses underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflict
265      })
266      public Builder then_(String...value) {
267         then_ = value;
268         return this;
269      }
270
271      /**
272       * Sets the {@link Schema#$comment} property on this annotation.
273       *
274       * @param value The new value for this property.
275       * @return This object.
276       */
277      @SuppressWarnings({
278         "java:S100" // Method name uses $ prefix to match JSON Schema keyword
279      })
280      public Builder $comment(String...value) {
281         this.$comment = value;
282         return this;
283      }
284
285      /**
286       * Sets the {@link Schema#$defs} property on this annotation.
287       *
288       * @param value The new value for this property.
289       * @return This object.
290       */
291      @SuppressWarnings({
292         "java:S100" // Method name uses $ prefix to match JSON Schema keyword
293      })
294      public Builder $defs(String...value) {
295         this.$defs = value;
296         return this;
297      }
298
299      /**
300       * Sets the {@link Schema#$id} property on this annotation.
301       *
302       * @param value The new value for this property.
303       * @return This object.
304       */
305      @SuppressWarnings({
306         "java:S100" // Method name uses $ prefix to match JSON Schema keyword
307      })
308      public Builder $id(String value) {
309         this.$id = value;
310         return this;
311      }
312
313      /**
314       * Sets the {@link Schema#$ref} property on this annotation.
315       *
316       * @param value The new value for this property.
317       * @return This object.
318       */
319      @SuppressWarnings({
320         "java:S100" // Method name uses $ prefix to match JSON Schema keyword
321      })
322      public Builder $ref(String value) {
323         this.$ref = value;
324         return this;
325      }
326
327      /**
328       * Sets the {@link Schema#aev} property on this annotation.
329       *
330       * @param value The new value for this property.
331       * @return This object.
332       */
333      public Builder aev(boolean value) {
334         aev = value;
335         return this;
336      }
337
338      /**
339       * Sets the {@link Schema#allOf} property on this annotation.
340       *
341       * @param value The new value for this property.
342       * @return This object.
343       */
344      public Builder allOf(String...value) {
345         allOf = value;
346         return this;
347      }
348
349      /**
350       * Sets the {@link Schema#allowEmptyValue} property on this annotation.
351       *
352       * @param value The new value for this property.
353       * @return This object.
354       */
355      public Builder allowEmptyValue(boolean value) {
356         allowEmptyValue = value;
357         return this;
358      }
359
360      /**
361       * Instantiates a new {@link Schema @Schema} object initialized with this builder.
362       *
363       * @return A new {@link Schema @Schema} object.
364       */
365      public Schema build() {
366         return new Object(this);
367      }
368
369      /**
370       * Sets the description property on this annotation.
371       *
372       * @param value The new value for this property.
373       * @return This object.
374       */
375      public Builder description(String...value) {
376         description = value;
377         return this;
378      }
379
380      /**
381       * Sets the {@link Schema#cf} property on this annotation.
382       *
383       * @param value The new value for this property.
384       * @return This object.
385       */
386      public Builder cf(String value) {
387         cf = value;
388         return this;
389      }
390
391      /**
392       * Sets the {@link Schema#collectionFormat} property on this annotation.
393       *
394       * @param value The new value for this property.
395       * @return This object.
396       */
397      public Builder collectionFormat(String value) {
398         collectionFormat = value;
399         return this;
400      }
401
402      /**
403       * Sets the {@link Schema#contentEncoding} property on this annotation.
404       *
405       * @param value The new value for this property.
406       * @return This object.
407       */
408      public Builder contentEncoding(String value) {
409         contentEncoding = value;
410         return this;
411      }
412
413      /**
414       * Sets the {@link Schema#contentMediaType} property on this annotation.
415       *
416       * @param value The new value for this property.
417       * @return This object.
418       */
419      public Builder contentMediaType(String value) {
420         contentMediaType = value;
421         return this;
422      }
423
424      /**
425       * Sets the {@link Schema#d} property on this annotation.
426       *
427       * @param value The new value for this property.
428       * @return This object.
429       */
430      public Builder d(String...value) {
431         d = value;
432         return this;
433      }
434
435      /**
436       * Sets the {@link Schema#dependentRequired} property on this annotation.
437       *
438       * @param value The new value for this property.
439       * @return This object.
440       */
441      public Builder dependentRequired(String...value) {
442         dependentRequired = value;
443         return this;
444      }
445
446      /**
447       * Sets the {@link Schema#dependentSchemas} property on this annotation.
448       *
449       * @param value The new value for this property.
450       * @return This object.
451       */
452      public Builder dependentSchemas(String...value) {
453         dependentSchemas = value;
454         return this;
455      }
456
457      /**
458       * Sets the {@link Schema#deprecated_()} property on this annotation.
459       *
460       * @param value The new value for this property.
461       * @return This object.
462       */
463      public Builder deprecatedProperty(boolean value) {
464         deprecatedProperty = value;
465         return this;
466      }
467
468      /**
469       * Sets the {@link Schema#df} property on this annotation.
470       *
471       * @param value The new value for this property.
472       * @return This object.
473       */
474      public Builder df(String...value) {
475         df = value;
476         return this;
477      }
478
479      /**
480       * Sets the {@link Schema#discriminator} property on this annotation.
481       *
482       * @param value The new value for this property.
483       * @return This object.
484       */
485      public Builder discriminator(String value) {
486         discriminator = value;
487         return this;
488      }
489
490      /**
491       * Sets the {@link Schema#e} property on this annotation.
492       *
493       * @param value The new value for this property.
494       * @return This object.
495       */
496      public Builder e(String...value) {
497         e = value;
498         return this;
499      }
500
501      /**
502       * Sets the {@link Schema#emax} property on this annotation.
503       *
504       * @param value The new value for this property.
505       * @return This object.
506       */
507      public Builder emax(boolean value) {
508         emax = value;
509         return this;
510      }
511
512      /**
513       * Sets the {@link Schema#emin} property on this annotation.
514       *
515       * @param value The new value for this property.
516       * @return This object.
517       */
518      public Builder emin(boolean value) {
519         emin = value;
520         return this;
521      }
522
523      /**
524       * Sets the {@link Schema#examples} property on this annotation.
525       *
526       * @param value The new value for this property.
527       * @return This object.
528       */
529      public Builder examples(String...value) {
530         examples = value;
531         return this;
532      }
533
534      /**
535       * Sets the {@link Schema#exclusiveMaximum} property on this annotation.
536       *
537       * @param value The new value for this property.
538       * @return This object.
539       */
540      public Builder exclusiveMaximum(boolean value) {
541         exclusiveMaximum = value;
542         return this;
543      }
544
545      /**
546       * Sets the {@link Schema#exclusiveMaximumValue} property on this annotation.
547       *
548       * @param value The new value for this property.
549       * @return This object.
550       */
551      public Builder exclusiveMaximumValue(String value) {
552         exclusiveMaximumValue = value;
553         return this;
554      }
555
556      /**
557       * Sets the {@link Schema#exclusiveMinimum} property on this annotation.
558       *
559       * @param value The new value for this property.
560       * @return This object.
561       */
562      public Builder exclusiveMinimum(boolean value) {
563         exclusiveMinimum = value;
564         return this;
565      }
566
567      /**
568       * Sets the {@link Schema#exclusiveMinimumValue} property on this annotation.
569       *
570       * @param value The new value for this property.
571       * @return This object.
572       */
573      public Builder exclusiveMinimumValue(String value) {
574         exclusiveMinimumValue = value;
575         return this;
576      }
577
578      /**
579       * Sets the {@link Schema#externalDocs} property on this annotation.
580       *
581       * @param value The new value for this property.
582       * @return This object.
583       */
584      public Builder externalDocs(ExternalDocs value) {
585         externalDocs = value;
586         return this;
587      }
588
589      /**
590       * Sets the {@link Schema#f} property on this annotation.
591       *
592       * @param value The new value for this property.
593       * @return This object.
594       */
595      public Builder f(String value) {
596         f = value;
597         return this;
598      }
599
600      /**
601       * Sets the {@link Schema#format} property on this annotation.
602       *
603       * @param value The new value for this property.
604       * @return This object.
605       */
606      public Builder format(String value) {
607         format = value;
608         return this;
609      }
610
611      /**
612       * Sets the {@link Schema#ignore} property on this annotation.
613       *
614       * @param value The new value for this property.
615       * @return This object.
616       */
617      public Builder ignore(boolean value) {
618         ignore = value;
619         return this;
620      }
621
622      /**
623       * Sets the {@link Schema#items} property on this annotation.
624       *
625       * @param value The new value for this property.
626       * @return This object.
627       */
628      public Builder items(Items value) {
629         items = value;
630         return this;
631      }
632
633      /**
634       * Sets the {@link Schema#max} property on this annotation.
635       *
636       * @param value The new value for this property.
637       * @return This object.
638       */
639      public Builder max(String value) {
640         max = value;
641         return this;
642      }
643
644      /**
645       * Sets the {@link Schema#maxi} property on this annotation.
646       *
647       * @param value The new value for this property.
648       * @return This object.
649       */
650      public Builder maxi(long value) {
651         maxi = value;
652         return this;
653      }
654
655      /**
656       * Sets the {@link Schema#maximum} property on this annotation.
657       *
658       * @param value The new value for this property.
659       * @return This object.
660       */
661      public Builder maximum(String value) {
662         maximum = value;
663         return this;
664      }
665
666      /**
667       * Sets the {@link Schema#maxItems} property on this annotation.
668       *
669       * @param value The new value for this property.
670       * @return This object.
671       */
672      public Builder maxItems(long value) {
673         maxItems = value;
674         return this;
675      }
676
677      /**
678       * Sets the {@link Schema#maxl} property on this annotation.
679       *
680       * @param value The new value for this property.
681       * @return This object.
682       */
683      public Builder maxl(long value) {
684         maxl = value;
685         return this;
686      }
687
688      /**
689       * Sets the {@link Schema#maxLength} property on this annotation.
690       *
691       * @param value The new value for this property.
692       * @return This object.
693       */
694      public Builder maxLength(long value) {
695         maxLength = value;
696         return this;
697      }
698
699      /**
700       * Sets the {@link Schema#maxp} property on this annotation.
701       *
702       * @param value The new value for this property.
703       * @return This object.
704       */
705      public Builder maxp(long value) {
706         maxp = value;
707         return this;
708      }
709
710      /**

712       *
713       * @param value The new value for this property.
714       * @return This object.
715       */
716      public Builder maxProperties(long value) {
717         maxProperties = value;
718         return this;
719      }
720
721      /**

723       *
724       * @param value The new value for this property.
725       * @return This object.
726       */
727      public Builder min(String value) {
728         min = value;
729         return this;
730      }
731
732      /**

734       *
735       * @param value The new value for this property.
736       * @return This object.
737       */
738      public Builder mini(long value) {
739         mini = value;
740         return this;
741      }
742
743      /**

745       *

748       */
749      public Builder minimum(String value) {
750         minimum = value;
751         return this;
752      }
753
754      /**

756       *
757       * @param value The new value for this property.
758       * @return This object.
759       */
760      public Builder minItems(long value) {
761         minItems = value;
762         return this;
763      }
764
765      /**

767       *
768       * @param value The new value for this property.
769       * @return This object.
770       */
771      public Builder minl(long value) {
772         minl = value;
773         return this;
774      }
775
776      /**
777       * Sets the {@link Schema#minLength} property on this annotation.
778       *
779       * @param value The new value for this property.
780       * @return This object.
781       */
782      public Builder minLength(long value) {
783         minLength = value;
784         return this;
785      }
786
787      /**
788       * Sets the {@link Schema#minp} property on this annotation.
789       *
790       * @param value The new value for this property.
791       * @return This object.
792       */
793      public Builder minp(long value) {
794         minp = value;
795         return this;
796      }
797
798      /**
799       * Sets the {@link Schema#minProperties} property on this annotation.
800       *
801       * @param value The new value for this property.
802       * @return This object.
803       */
804      public Builder minProperties(long value) {
805         minProperties = value;
806         return this;
807      }
808
809      /**
810       * Sets the {@link Schema#mo} property on this annotation.
811       *
812       * @param value The new value for this property.
813       * @return This object.
814       */
815      public Builder mo(String value) {
816         mo = value;
817         return this;
818      }
819
820      /**
821       * Sets the {@link Schema#multipleOf} property on this annotation.
822       *
823       * @param value The new value for this property.
824       * @return This object.
825       */
826      public Builder multipleOf(String value) {
827         multipleOf = value;
828         return this;
829      }
830
831      // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
832      // JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 property setters
833      // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
834
835      /**
836       * Sets the {@link Schema#p} property on this annotation.
837       *
838       * @param value The new value for this property.
839       * @return This object.
840       */
841      public Builder p(String value) {
842         p = value;
843         return this;
844      }
845
846      /**
847       * Sets the {@link Schema#pattern} property on this annotation.
848       *
849       * @param value The new value for this property.
850       * @return This object.
851       */
852      public Builder pattern(String value) {
853         pattern = value;
854         return this;
855      }
856
857      /**
858       * Sets the {@link Schema#prefixItems} property on this annotation.
859       *
860       * @param value The new value for this property.
861       * @return This object.
862       */
863      public Builder prefixItems(String...value) {
864         prefixItems = value;
865         return this;
866      }
867
868      /**
869       * Sets the {@link Schema#r} property on this annotation.
870       *
871       * @param value The new value for this property.
872       * @return This object.
873       */
874      public Builder r(boolean value) {
875         r = value;
876         return this;
877      }
878
879      /**
880       * Sets the {@link Schema#readOnly} property on this annotation.
881       *
882       * @param value The new value for this property.
883       * @return This object.
884       */
885      public Builder readOnly(boolean value) {
886         readOnly = value;
887         return this;
888      }
889
890      /**
891       * Sets the {@link Schema#required} property on this annotation.
892       *
893       * @param value The new value for this property.
894       * @return This object.
895       */
896      public Builder required(boolean value) {
897         required = value;
898         return this;
899      }
900
901      /**
902       * Sets the {@link Schema#ro} property on this annotation.
903       *
904       * @param value The new value for this property.
905       * @return This object.
906       */
907      public Builder ro(boolean value) {
908         ro = value;
909         return this;
910      }
911
912      /**
913       * Sets the {@link Schema#sie} property on this annotation.
914       *
915       * @param value The new value for this property.
916       * @return This object.
917       */
918      public Builder sie(boolean value) {
919         sie = value;
920         return this;
921      }
922
923      /**
924       * Sets the {@link Schema#skipIfEmpty} property on this annotation.
925       *
926       * @param value The new value for this property.
927       * @return This object.
928       */
929      public Builder skipIfEmpty(boolean value) {
930         skipIfEmpty = value;
931         return this;
932      }
933
934      /**
935       * Sets the {@link Schema#su} property on this annotation.
936       *
937       * @param value The new value for this property.
938       * @return This object.
939       * @since 10.0.0
940       */
941      public Builder su(String value) {
942         su = value;
943         return this;
944      }
945
946      /**
947       * Sets the {@link Schema#summary} property on this annotation.
948       *
949       * @param value The new value for this property.
950       * @return This object.
951       * @since 10.0.0
952       */
953      public Builder summary(String value) {
954         summary = value;
955         return this;
956      }
957
958      /**
959       * Sets the {@link Schema#t} property on this annotation.
960       *
961       * @param value The new value for this property.
962       * @return This object.
963       */
964      public Builder t(String value) {
965         t = value;
966         return this;
967      }
968
969      /**
970       * Sets the {@link Schema#title} property on this annotation.
971       *
972       * @param value The new value for this property.
973       * @return This object.
974       */
975      public Builder title(String value) {
976         title = value;
977         return this;
978      }
979
980      /**
981       * Sets the {@link Schema#type} property on this annotation.
982       *
983       * @param value The new value for this property.
984       * @return This object.
985       */
986      public Builder type(String value) {
987         type = value;
988         return this;
989      }
990
991      /**
992       * Sets the {@link Schema#ui} property on this annotation.
993       *
994       * @param value The new value for this property.
995       * @return This object.
996       */
997      public Builder ui(boolean value) {
998         ui = value;
999         return this;
1000      }
1001
1002      /**
1003       * Sets the {@link Schema#unevaluatedItems} property on this annotation.
1004       *
1005       * @param value The new value for this property.
1006       * @return This object.
1007       */
1008      public Builder unevaluatedItems(String...value) {
1009         unevaluatedItems = value;
1010         return this;
1011      }
1012
1013      /**
1014       * Sets the {@link Schema#unevaluatedProperties} property on this annotation.
1015       *
1016       * @param value The new value for this property.
1017       * @return This object.
1018       */
1019      public Builder unevaluatedProperties(String...value) {
1020         unevaluatedProperties = value;
1021         return this;
1022      }
1023
1024      /**
1025       * Sets the {@link Schema#uniqueItems} property on this annotation.
1026       *
1027       * @param value The new value for this property.
1028       * @return This object.
1029       */
1030      public Builder uniqueItems(boolean value) {
1031         uniqueItems = value;
1032         return this;
1033      }
1034
1035      /**
1036       * Sets the {@link Schema#xml} property on this annotation.
1037       *
1038       * @param value The new value for this property.
1039       * @return This object.
1040       */
1041      public Builder xml(String...value) {
1042         xml = value;
1043         return this;
1044      }
1045
1046   }
1047
1048   @SuppressWarnings({
1049      "java:S116",  // Field names intentionally match JSON property names
1050      "java:S2160"  // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
1051   })
1052   private static class Object extends AnnotationObject implements Schema {
1053
1054      private final String[] description;
1055      private final boolean aev;
1056      private final boolean allowEmptyValue;
1057      private final boolean exclusiveMaximum;
1058      private final boolean emax;
1059      private final boolean exclusiveMinimum;
1060      private final boolean emin;
1061      private final boolean uniqueItems;
1062      private final boolean ui;
1063      private final boolean required;
1064      private final boolean r;
1065      private final boolean readOnly;
1066      private final boolean ro;
1067      private final boolean sie;
1068      private final boolean skipIfEmpty;
1069      private final boolean ignore;
1070      private final ExternalDocs externalDocs;
1071      private final Items items;
1072      private final long maxLength;
1073      private final long maxl;
1074      private final long minLength;
1075      private final long minl;
1076      private final long maxItems;
1077      private final long maxi;
1078      private final long minItems;
1079      private final long mini;
1080      private final long maxProperties;
1081      private final long maxp;
1082      private final long minProperties;
1083      private final long minp;
1084      private final String $ref;
1085      private final String format;
1086      private final String f;
1087      private final String title;
1088      private final String multipleOf;
1089      private final String mo;
1090      private final String maximum;
1091      private final String max;
1092      private final String minimum;
1093      private final String min;
1094      private final String pattern;
1095      private final String p;
1096      private final String su;
1097      private final String summary;
1098      private final String type;
1099      private final String t;
1100      private final String collectionFormat;
1101      private final String cf;
1102      private final String discriminator;
1103      private final String[] d;
1104      private final String[] default_;
1105      private final String[] df;
1106      private final String[] enum_;
1107      private final String[] e;
1108      private final String[] allOf;
1109      private final String[] xml;
1110      // JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 fields
1111      private final boolean deprecatedProperty;
1112      private final String $id;
1113      private final String contentMediaType;
1114      private final String contentEncoding;
1115      private final String exclusiveMaximumValue;
1116      private final String exclusiveMinimumValue;
1117      private final String[] const_;
1118      private final String[] examples;
1119      private final String[] $comment;
1120      private final String[] prefixItems;
1121      private final String[] unevaluatedItems;
1122      private final String[] unevaluatedProperties;
1123      private final String[] dependentSchemas;
1124      private final String[] dependentRequired;
1125      private final String[] if_;
1126      private final String[] then_;
1127      private final String[] else_;
1128      private final String[] $defs;
1129
1130      Object(SchemaAnnotation.Builder b) {
1131         super(b);
1132         description = copyOf(b.description);
1133         $ref = b.$ref;
1134         default_ = copyOf(b.default_);
1135         enum_ = copyOf(b.enum_);
1136         allOf = copyOf(b.allOf);
1137         aev = b.aev;
1138         allowEmptyValue = b.allowEmptyValue;
1139         cf = b.cf;
1140         collectionFormat = b.collectionFormat;
1141         d = copyOf(b.d);
1142         df = copyOf(b.df);
1143         discriminator = b.discriminator;
1144         e = copyOf(b.e);
1145         emax = b.emax;
1146         emin = b.emin;
1147         exclusiveMaximum = b.exclusiveMaximum;
1148         exclusiveMinimum = b.exclusiveMinimum;
1149         externalDocs = b.externalDocs;
1150         f = b.f;
1151         format = b.format;
1152         ignore = b.ignore;
1153         items = b.items;
1154         max = b.max;
1155         maxi = b.maxi;
1156         maximum = b.maximum;
1157         maxItems = b.maxItems;
1158         maxl = b.maxl;
1159         maxLength = b.maxLength;
1160         maxp = b.maxp;
1161         maxProperties = b.maxProperties;
1162         min = b.min;
1163         mini = b.mini;
1164         minimum = b.minimum;
1165         minItems = b.minItems;
1166         minl = b.minl;
1167         minLength = b.minLength;
1168         minp = b.minp;
1169         minProperties = b.minProperties;
1170         mo = b.mo;
1171         multipleOf = b.multipleOf;
1172         p = b.p;
1173         pattern = b.pattern;
1174         r = b.r;
1175         readOnly = b.readOnly;
1176         required = b.required;
1177         ro = b.ro;
1178         sie = b.sie;
1179         skipIfEmpty = b.skipIfEmpty;
1180         su = b.su;
1181         summary = b.summary;
1182         t = b.t;
1183         title = b.title;
1184         type = b.type;
1185         ui = b.ui;
1186         uniqueItems = b.uniqueItems;
1187         xml = copyOf(b.xml);
1188         deprecatedProperty = b.deprecatedProperty;
1189         $id = b.$id;
1190         contentMediaType = b.contentMediaType;
1191         contentEncoding = b.contentEncoding;
1192         exclusiveMaximumValue = b.exclusiveMaximumValue;
1193         exclusiveMinimumValue = b.exclusiveMinimumValue;
1194         const_ = copyOf(b.const_);
1195         examples = copyOf(b.examples);
1196         $comment = copyOf(b.$comment);
1197         prefixItems = copyOf(b.prefixItems);
1198         unevaluatedItems = copyOf(b.unevaluatedItems);
1199         unevaluatedProperties = copyOf(b.unevaluatedProperties);
1200         dependentSchemas = copyOf(b.dependentSchemas);
1201         dependentRequired = copyOf(b.dependentRequired);
1202         if_ = copyOf(b.if_);
1203         then_ = copyOf(b.then_);
1204         else_ = copyOf(b.else_);
1205         $defs = copyOf(b.$defs);
1206      }
1207
1208      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1209      public String[] const_() {
1210         return const_;
1211      }
1212
1213      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1214      public String[] default_() {
1215         return default_;
1216      }
1217
1218      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1219      public String[] else_() {
1220         return else_;
1221      }
1222
1223      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1224      public String[] enum_() {
1225         return enum_;
1226      }
1227
1228      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1229      public String[] if_() {
1230         return if_;
1231      }
1232
1233      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1234      public String[] then_() {
1235         return then_;
1236      }
1237
1238      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1239      public String[] $comment() {
1240         return $comment;
1241      }
1242
1243      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1244      public String[] $defs() {
1245         return $defs;
1246      }
1247
1248      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1249      public String $id() {
1250         return $id;
1251      }
1252
1253      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1254      public String $ref() {
1255         return $ref;
1256      }
1257
1258      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1259      public boolean aev() {
1260         return aev;
1261      }
1262
1263      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1264      public String[] allOf() {
1265         return allOf;
1266      }
1267
1268      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1269      public boolean allowEmptyValue() {
1270         return allowEmptyValue;
1271      }
1272
1273      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1274      public String cf() {
1275         return cf;
1276      }
1277
1278      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1279      public String collectionFormat() {
1280         return collectionFormat;
1281      }
1282
1283      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1284      public String contentEncoding() {
1285         return contentEncoding;
1286      }
1287
1288      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1289      public String contentMediaType() {
1290         return contentMediaType;
1291      }
1292
1293      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1294      public String[] d() {
1295         return d;
1296      }
1297
1298      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1299      public String[] dependentRequired() {
1300         return dependentRequired;
1301      }
1302
1303      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1304      public String[] dependentSchemas() {
1305         return dependentSchemas;
1306      }
1307
1308      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1309      public boolean deprecated_() {
1310         return deprecatedProperty;
1311      }
1312
1313      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1314      public String[] df() {
1315         return df;
1316      }
1317
1318      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1319      public String discriminator() {
1320         return discriminator;
1321      }
1322
1323      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1324      public String[] e() {
1325         return e;
1326      }
1327
1328      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1329      public boolean emax() {
1330         return emax;
1331      }
1332
1333      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1334      public boolean emin() {
1335         return emin;
1336      }
1337
1338      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1339      public String[] examples() {
1340         return examples;
1341      }
1342
1343      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1344      public boolean exclusiveMaximum() {
1345         return exclusiveMaximum;
1346      }
1347
1348      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1349      public String exclusiveMaximumValue() {
1350         return exclusiveMaximumValue;
1351      }
1352
1353      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1354      public boolean exclusiveMinimum() {
1355         return exclusiveMinimum;
1356      }
1357
1358      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1359      public String exclusiveMinimumValue() {
1360         return exclusiveMinimumValue;
1361      }
1362
1363      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1364      public ExternalDocs externalDocs() {
1365         return externalDocs;
1366      }
1367
1368      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1369      public String f() {
1370         return f;
1371      }
1372
1373      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1374      public String format() {
1375         return format;
1376      }
1377
1378      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1379      public boolean ignore() {
1380         return ignore;
1381      }
1382
1383      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1384      public Items items() {
1385         return items;
1386      }
1387
1388      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1389      public String max() {
1390         return max;
1391      }
1392
1393      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1394      public long maxi() {
1395         return maxi;
1396      }
1397
1398      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1399      public String maximum() {
1400         return maximum;
1401      }
1402
1403      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1404      public long maxItems() {
1405         return maxItems;
1406      }
1407
1408      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1409      public long maxl() {
1410         return maxl;
1411      }
1412
1413      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1414      public long maxLength() {
1415         return maxLength;
1416      }
1417
1418      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1419      public long maxp() {
1420         return maxp;
1421      }
1422
1423      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1424      public long maxProperties() {
1425         return maxProperties;
1426      }
1427
1428      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1429      public String min() {
1430         return min;
1431      }
1432
1433      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1434      public long mini() {
1435         return mini;
1436      }
1437
1438      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1439      public String minimum() {
1440         return minimum;
1441      }
1442
1443      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1444      public long minItems() {
1445         return minItems;
1446      }
1447
1448      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1449      public long minl() {

1451      }

1454      public long minLength() {

1456      }

1459      public long minp() {

1463      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1464      public long minProperties() {

1467
1468      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1469      public String mo() {
1470         return mo;
1471      }
1472
1473      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1474      public String multipleOf() {
1475         return multipleOf;
1476      }
1477
1478      // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1479      // JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 property getters
1480      // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1481
1482      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1483      public String p() {
1484         return p;
1485      }
1486
1487      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1488      public String pattern() {
1489         return pattern;
1490      }
1491
1492      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1493      public String[] prefixItems() {
1494         return prefixItems;
1495      }
1496
1497      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1498      public boolean r() {
1499         return r;
1500      }
1501
1502      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1503      public boolean readOnly() {
1504         return readOnly;
1505      }
1506
1507      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1508      public boolean required() {
1509         return required;
1510      }
1511
1512      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1513      public boolean ro() {
1514         return ro;
1515      }
1516
1517      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1518      public boolean sie() {
1519         return sie;
1520      }
1521
1522      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1523      public boolean skipIfEmpty() {
1524         return skipIfEmpty;
1525      }
1526
1527      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1528      public String su() {
1529         return su;
1530      }
1531
1532      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1533      public String summary() {
1534         return summary;
1535      }
1536
1537      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1538      public String t() {
1539         return t;
1540      }
1541
1542      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1543      public String title() {
1544         return title;
1545      }
1546
1547      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1548      public String type() {
1549         return type;
1550      }
1551
1552      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1553      public boolean ui() {
1554         return ui;
1555      }
1556
1557      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1558      public String[] unevaluatedItems() {
1559         return unevaluatedItems;
1560      }
1561
1562      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1563      public String[] unevaluatedProperties() {
1564         return unevaluatedProperties;
1565      }
1566
1567      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1568      public boolean uniqueItems() {
1569         return uniqueItems;
1570      }
1571
1572      @Override /* Overridden from Schema */
1573      public String[] xml() {
1574         return xml;
1575      }
1576
1577      @Override /* Overridden from annotation */
1578      public String[] description() {
1579         return description;
1580      }
1581   }
1582
1583   /** Default value */
1584   public static final Schema DEFAULT = create().build();
1585
1586   /**
1587    * Converts the specified <ja>@Schema</ja> annotation into a generic map.
1588    *
1589    * @param a The annotation instance.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1590    * @return The schema converted to a map, or and empty map if the annotation was null.
1591    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1592    */
1593   @SuppressWarnings({
1594      "removal" // Handles deprecated boolean-style exclusiveMaximum/exclusiveMinimum for backward compatibility
1595   })
1596   public static JsonMap asMap(Schema a) throws ParseException {
1597      if (a == null)
1598         return JsonMap.EMPTY_MAP;
1599      var m = new JsonMap();
1600      if (SchemaAnnotation.empty(a))
1601         return m;
1602      Predicate<String> ne = Utils::ne;
1603      Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Utils::ne;
1604      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Utils::ne;
1605      Predicate<Boolean> nf = Utils::isTrue;
1606      Predicate<Long> nm1 = Utils::nm1;
1607
1608      // Handle exclusiveMaximum with Draft 2020-12 fallback
1609      String exclusiveMaximumValue;
1610      if (ne.test(a.exclusiveMaximumValue())) {
1611         exclusiveMaximumValue = a.exclusiveMaximumValue();
1612      } else if (a.exclusiveMaximum() || a.emax()) {
1613         exclusiveMaximumValue = "true";
1614      } else {
1615         exclusiveMaximumValue = null;
1616      }
1617
1618      // Handle exclusiveMinimum with Draft 2020-12 fallback
1619      String exclusiveMinimumValue;
1620      if (ne.test(a.exclusiveMinimumValue())) {
1621         exclusiveMinimumValue = a.exclusiveMinimumValue();
1622      } else if (a.exclusiveMinimum() || a.emin()) {
1623         exclusiveMinimumValue = "true";
1624      } else {
1625         exclusiveMinimumValue = null;
1626      }
1627
1628      // @formatter:off
1629      return m
1630         .appendIf(ne, PROP_allOf, joinnl(a.allOf()))
1631         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_collectionFormat, a.collectionFormat(), a.cf())
1632         .appendIf(ne, PROP_default, joinnl(a.default_(), a.df()))
1633         .appendIf(ne, PROP_discriminator, a.discriminator())
1634         .appendIf(ne, PROP_description, joinnl(a.description(), a.d()))
1635         .appendFirst(nec, PROP_enum, parseSet(a.enum_()), parseSet(a.e()))
1636         .appendIf(ne, PROP_exclusiveMaximum, exclusiveMaximumValue)
1637         .appendIf(ne, PROP_exclusiveMinimum, exclusiveMinimumValue)
1638         .appendIf(nem, PROP_externalDocs, ExternalDocsAnnotation.merge(m.getMap(PROP_externalDocs), a.externalDocs()))
1639         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_format, a.format(), a.f())
1640         .appendIf(ne, PROP_ignore, a.ignore() ? "true" : null)
1641         .appendIf(nem, PROP_items, merge(m.getMap(PROP_items), a.items()))
1642         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_maximum, a.maximum(), a.max())
1643         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_maxItems, a.maxItems(), a.maxi())
1644         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_maxLength, a.maxLength(), a.maxl())
1645         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_maxProperties, a.maxProperties(), a.maxp())
1646         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_minimum, a.minimum(), a.min())
1647         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_minItems, a.minItems(), a.mini())
1648         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_minLength, a.minLength(), a.minl())
1649         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_minProperties, a.minProperties(), a.minp())
1650         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_multipleOf, a.multipleOf(), a.mo())
1651         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_pattern, a.pattern(), a.p())
1652         .appendIf(nf, PROP_readOnly, a.readOnly() || a.ro())
1653         .appendIf(nf, PROP_required, a.required() || a.r())
1654         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_summary, a.summary(), a.su())
1655         .appendIf(ne, PROP_title, a.title())
1656         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_type, a.type(), a.t())
1657         .appendIf(nf, PROP_uniqueItems, a.uniqueItems() || a.ui())
1658         .appendIf(ne, PROP_xml, joinnl(a.xml()))
1659         .appendIf(ne, PROP_ref, a.$ref())
1660         // JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 properties
1661         .appendIf(ne, PROP_const, joinnl(a.const_()))
1662         .appendIf(nec, PROP_examples, a.examples().length == 0 ? null : l(a.examples()))
1663         .appendIf(ne, PROP_comment, joinnl(a.$comment()))
1664         .appendIf(nf, PROP_deprecated, a.deprecated_())
1665         .appendIf(ne, PROP_contentMediaType, a.contentMediaType())
1666         .appendIf(ne, PROP_contentEncoding, a.contentEncoding())
1667         .appendIf(ne, PROP_prefixItems, joinnl(a.prefixItems()))
1668         .appendIf(ne, PROP_unevaluatedItems, joinnl(a.unevaluatedItems()))
1669         .appendIf(ne, PROP_unevaluatedProperties, joinnl(a.unevaluatedProperties()))
1670         .appendIf(ne, PROP_dependentSchemas, joinnl(a.dependentSchemas()))
1671         .appendIf(ne, PROP_dependentRequired, joinnl(a.dependentRequired()))
1672         .appendIf(ne, PROP_if, joinnl(a.if_()))
1673         .appendIf(ne, PROP_then, joinnl(a.then_()))
1674         .appendIf(ne, PROP_else, joinnl(a.else_()))
1675         .appendIf(ne, PROP_defs, joinnl(a.$defs()))
1676         .appendIf(ne, PROP_id, a.$id())
1677      ;
1678      // @formatter:on
1679   }
1680
1681   /**
1682    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
1683    *
1684    * @return A new builder object.
1685    */
1686   public static Builder create() {
1687      return new Builder();
1688   }
1689
1690   /**
1691    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified annotation contains all default values.
1692    *
1693    * @param a The annotation to check.
1694    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified annotation contains all default values.
1695    */
1696   public static boolean empty(Schema a) {
1697      return a == null || DEFAULT.equals(a);
1698   }
1699
1700   private static JsonMap merge(JsonMap m, Items a) throws ParseException {
1701      if (ItemsAnnotation.empty(a))
1702         return m;
1703      if (m == null)
1704         m = new JsonMap();
1705      Predicate<String> ne = Utils::ne;
1706      Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Utils::ne;
1707      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Utils::ne;
1708      Predicate<Boolean> nf = Utils::isTrue;
1709      Predicate<Long> nm1 = Utils::nm1;
1710      return m.appendFirst(ne, PROP_collectionFormat, a.collectionFormat(), a.cf()).appendIf(ne, PROP_default, joinnl(a.default_(), a.df())).appendFirst(nec, PROP_enum, parseSet(a.enum_()), parseSet(a.e()))
1711         .appendFirst(ne, PROP_format, a.format(), a.f()).appendIf(nf, PROP_exclusiveMaximum, a.exclusiveMaximum() || a.emax()).appendIf(nf, PROP_exclusiveMinimum, a.exclusiveMinimum() || a.emin())
1712         .appendIf(nem, PROP_items, SubItemsAnnotation.merge(m.getMap(PROP_items), a.items())).appendFirst(ne, PROP_maximum, a.maximum(), a.max()).appendFirst(nm1, PROP_maxItems, a.maxItems(), a.maxi())
1713         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_maxLength, a.maxLength(), a.maxl()).appendFirst(ne, PROP_minimum, a.minimum(), a.min()).appendFirst(nm1, PROP_minItems, a.minItems(), a.mini())
1714         .appendFirst(nm1, PROP_minLength, a.minLength(), a.minl()).appendFirst(ne, PROP_multipleOf, a.multipleOf(), a.mo()).appendFirst(ne, PROP_pattern, a.pattern(), a.p())
1715         .appendIf(nf, PROP_uniqueItems, a.uniqueItems() || a.ui()).appendFirst(ne, PROP_type, a.type(), a.t()).appendIf(ne, PROP_ref, a.$ref());
1716   }
1717}
